creator: simon@ikanobori.jp
text:
If I read the buildlog correctly (this is my first time submitting a 
port), the build failed because I did not include Pygments (a dependency 
of bpython) in the pkg-plist file.

Removing it might be unwanted because people might have Pygments 
installed separately from bpython.

I have an edited makefile attached to this message which features a 
RUN_DEPENDS for pygments, it should solve the problem with the Pygments 
files being left behind.
